audience.zh: 适合想系统进入机器学习的前端、产品和数据方向学习者
audience.en: Best for frontend, product, and data learners entering ML systematically

summary.zh: 从问题定义、数据集、模型训练到评估方法，建立一套完整的 ML 入门视角。
summary.en: Build a complete beginner-friendly mental model for ML, from problem framing and datasets to training loops and evaluation.

zh: 理解监督学习任务的常见工作流
知道训练集、验证集和测试集分别解决什么问题
能够读懂基础模型实验结果并避免常见误区
en: Understand the common workflow behind supervised learning projects
Know what train, validation, and test sets are each responsible for
Read simple model results with fewer beginner mistakes
